summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of V85 Travanalys horse racing analysis app. All core features working correctly with exact calculations as specified.
passed_tests: JSON input and validation with proper error handling
Analysis calculations (odds/100, betDistribution/10, implied%, value gap) - mathematically exact
Table display with all horse data and formatting
Column sorting on all fields (number, name, odds, streck%, implied%, value gap)
Filtering: All horses, Spelvärda (>2%), Favoriter (<10 odds)
Search functionality by horse name and number
Color coding: Yellow for neutral values (0-2%), ready for green (>2%) and red (<0%)
System builder automatic mode with value-based suggestions
System builder manual mode with user instructions
Toggle between automatic and manual modes
Copy automatic suggestions to manual mode
Clear functionality resets all data and UI state
Dark theme implementation with proper contrast
